diagrams.title: Basic Connectives Symbol Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the 5 basic logical connectives with their symbols and reading
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for all connectives and their meanings

diagrams.title: Truth Table Summary Chart
diagrams.description: Complete truth tables for all 5 basic connectives in one view
diagrams.purpose: Single reference for all connective truth values

diagrams.title: Implication Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the structure of p→q with antecedent and consequent labeled
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how implication works and when it fails

diagrams.title: Implication Family Relationships
diagrams.description: Shows original implication and its three related forms
elements: Arrow showing equivalence between original and contrapositive
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing relationships between implication and its variants

diagrams.title: Tautology Contradiction Contingency
diagrams.description: Visual classification of compound propositions based on truth table results
elements: Tautology: ALL TRUE in final column
Contradiction: ALL FALSE in final column
Contingency: MIXED TRUE/FALSE in final column
diagrams.purpose: Quick identification of proposition types from truth tables
